title: Find First Palindromic String in the Array
titleCn: 找出数组中的第一个回文字符串

testcases.input: words = ["abc","car","ada","racecar","cool"] Output: "ada" Explanation: The first string that is palindromic is "ada". Note that "racecar" is also palindromic, but it is not the first.
testcases.expectedOutput: "ada" Explanation: The first string that is palindromic is "ada". Note that "racecar" is also palindromic, but it is not the first.

testcases.input: words = ["notapalindrome","racecar"] Output: "racecar" Explanation: The first and only string that is palindromic is "racecar".
testcases.expectedOutput: "racecar" Explanation: The first and only string that is palindromic is "racecar".

testcases.input: words = ["def","ghi"] Output: "" Explanation: There are no palindromic strings, so the empty string is returned.
testcases.expectedOutput: "" Explanation: There are no palindromic strings, so the empty string is returned.
